mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS announcement_id, a.title AS announcement_title, a.content AS announcement_content, a.img AS announcement_img, a.bank AS announcement_bank, a.status AS announcement_status, a.create_time AS announcement_create_time, a.update_time AS announcement_update_time, c.id AS content_id, c.user_id AS content_user_id, c.content AS content_content, c.create_time AS content_create_time FROM announcement a LEFT JOIN content c ON a.id = c.announcement_id
AND a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND a.status = 1
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id AS announcement_id, a.title AS announcement_title, a.content AS announcement_content, a.img AS announcement_img, a.bank AS announcement_bank, a.status AS announcement_status, a.create_time AS announcement_create_time, a.update_time AS announcement_update_time, c.id AS content_id, c.user_id AS content_user_id, c.content AS content_content, c.create_time AS content_create_time FROM announcement a LEFT JOIN content c ON a.id = c.announcement_id
AND a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
